title: Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group:
Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group!
